title: EU financial entity
arguments: Digital payments platform operating in the EU as a regulated financial entity. Need compliance assessment for 2026 operations. --as-of 2026-02-15 --jurisdictions EU --industry fintech --strict-facts

title: Non-EU ICT provider serving EU banks
arguments: US cloud software vendor providing critical ICT services to EU banks, with EU personal data in telemetry. --as-of 2026-02-15 --jurisdictions EU,US --industry fintech-vendor --strict-facts

title: Generic non-financial SaaS negative control
arguments: Project management SaaS for mid-market companies with no financial institution customers. --as-of 2026-02-15 --jurisdictions US --industry saas --strict-facts
must_not_include: ICT risk management obligations under DORA

title: EU insurer with critical ICT dependencies
arguments: EU insurance platform classified as regulated financial entity depends on cloud and payment vendors for critical services. --as-of 2026-02-15 --jurisdictions EU --industry insurance-tech --strict-facts

title: EU financial entity with US subprocessors
arguments: EU digital bank uses US-based subprocessors for telemetry and support systems and needs DORA-depth operating model. --as-of 2026-02-15 --jurisdictions EU,US --industry fintech --strict-facts
